read: Synthetic variant-family generator. Emits three-to-four snapshots of one song (a shared variant_family + labels + derived_from chaining) that genuinely differ by a track, a send, and a parameter, all referencing one shared audio asset.
known_limitations: Not a real DAW capture: every value is hand-authored to exercise the contract. Source stability is MANUAL throughout. Real per-version Logic families are Phase 4.
